positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical design featuring bioluminescent tropical foliage and stylized celestial elements. The composition should center around a massive, luminous cosmic tree whose roots intertwine with glowing jungle vines. The color palette must consist of deep midnight blues, vibrant cyan, neon magenta, and emerald green accents. Use strong, defined silhouettes and sharp, clean lines suitable for single-color screen printing or linocut style. Focus on high contrast and dramatic rim lighting. Minimalist yet intricate, perfect for a central apparel graphic.
